title: One Touch of Venus
director: William A. Seiter, Gregory La Cava
writer: Harry Kurnitz, Frank Tashlin, S.J. Perelman
actors: Robert Walker, Ava Gardner, Dick Haymes
plot: Fantasy comedy about a young window dresser who kisses a statue of Venus, which then comes to life in the form of Ava Gardner. However, the problems begin when Venus falls in love with him.
